# FastMCP Reference Index

Use this file to choose the smallest relevant reference before opening a large chunk.

| File | Source lines | Covers |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| `01-apps-ui.md` | 1-1045 | Custom HTML apps, prefab apps, UI patterns, charts, forms, status displays, and app wiring. |
| `02-cli-install-run-auth.md` | 1046-2045 | Client CLI commands, inspecting servers, installing servers, running servers, and client-side bearer/CIMD/OAuth authentication helpers. |
| `03-client-core.md` | 2046-3388 | Client creation, callbacks, elicitation, logging, notifications, prompts, resources, roots, sampling, and background task primitives. |
| `04-client-transports-deployment.md` | 3389-5086 | Tool calling, transports, HTTP deployment, ASGI mounting, production deployment, Horizon hosting, and run() transport choices. |
| `05-project-setup-quickstart.md` | 5087-6312 | Project configuration, installation, quickstart, intro material, and Anthropic/OpenAI style remote calling examples. |
| `06-auth-provider-guides-1.md` | 6313-7346 | Auth0, AuthKit, AWS Cognito, and Azure provider setup and production notes. |
| `07-client-framework-integrations.md` | 7347-9928 | ChatGPT, Claude Code/Desktop, Cursor, FastAPI, Gemini, GitHub, Google, and Goose integration guides. |
| `08-config-openapi-auth-guides-2.md` | 9929-12281 | MCP JSON config, OCI IAM, OpenAI API integration, OpenAPI conversion, Permit.io, PropelAuth, Scalekit, Supabase, and WorkOS guides. |
| `09-auth-architecture.md` | 12282-14858 | Core authentication model, OAuth server and proxy patterns, remote auth, token verification, and authorization middleware concepts. |
| `10-composition-context-lifecycle.md` | 14859-16616 | Composing servers, context access, dependency injection, icons, lifespans, and related runtime composition patterns. |
| `11-middleware-lifecycle.md` | 16617-18197 | Client logging, middleware, pagination, progress reporting, prompts, prompt registration behavior, and notifications. |
| `12-provider-patterns-resources.md` | 18198-20824 | Custom providers, filesystem/local/proxy/skills providers, resources/templates, and sampling behavior. |
| `13-server-core-storage-testing.md` | 20825-22016 | Server instructions, storage backends, background tasks, telemetry, and testing guidance. |
| `14-tools-and-code-mode.md` | 22017-23452 | Tool registration, validation, visibility, code mode, and tool behavior details. |
| `15-transforms-visibility.md` | 23453-25090 | Namespace transforms, prompts/resources as tools, search, tool transforms, versioning, and component visibility controls. |
| `16-changelog-and-auth-utils.md` | 25091-28335 | Changelog, auth utilities, generate CLI, and other post-guide operational notes. |
| `17-contributing-and-tests.md` | 28336-29117 | Contribution workflow, release process, and test guidance. |
| `18-upgrade-guides.md` | 29118-30304 | Migration guidance from FastMCP 2, the low-level SDK, and the MCP SDK. |
| `19-api-reference-cli.md` | 30305-31469 | Package-level API reference for fastmcp.cli and install/run/task helpers. |
| `20-api-reference-client.md` | 31470-34657 | Package-level API reference for fastmcp.client, transports, sampling handlers, prompts, resources, and decorators. |
| `21-api-reference-server-auth.md` | 34658-38288 | Package-level API reference for server auth, auth providers, settings, telemetry, redirect validation, and SSRF helpers. |
| `22-api-reference-server-runtime.md` | 38289-43132 | Package-level API reference for context, dependencies, elicitation, event store, HTTP, lifespan, middleware, OpenAPI, providers, and proxy support. |
| `23-api-reference-server-advanced.md` | 43133-46745 | Package-level API reference for sampling, server tasks, telemetry, transforms, and core tool classes. |
| `24-api-reference-utilities.md` | 46746-49219 | Utility package reference for auth, CLI helpers, JSON schema tools, lifecycle helpers, OpenAPI helpers, pagination, skills, testing, timeout, and version helpers. |
